problem_statement: Fix calculator.add so it returns the sum of two numbers instead of the difference.

files.calculator.py:
def add(a, b):
    return a - b

problem_statement: Fix slugify so it lowercases text and replaces runs of whitespace with a single dash.
hints_text: Use a regex or split/join to collapse whitespace.

problem_statement: Fix first_even so it returns the first even number in a list and returns None when no even number exists.
